/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/mips_display.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libmips_display.so -o libmips_display.so CMakeFiles/mips_display.dir/Main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mips_display.dir/MipsDisplay.cpp.o  /usr/lib64/libGL.so /usr/lib64/libX11.so /usr/lib64/libpng.so /usr/lib64/libz.so
